name: io.github.Pantani/tdmcp
title: tdmcp — TouchDesigner MCP server
description: Build real visual systems in TouchDesigner from plain language with Claude, Cursor or Codex.

environmentVariables.name: TDMCP_TOOL_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool exposure profile. Use full for the installed runtime, safe to hide destructive/raw-code tools, or directory only for compact hosted directory scans.

environmentVariables.name: TDMCP_RAW_PYTHON
environmentVariables.description: Hide raw client-authored Python escape-hatch tools in registry scans.
